title: Security Vulnerability Scanning — 3¢ Per Scan
excerpt: The /v1/security endpoint scans your code for vulnerabilities for just 3¢. SQL injection, XSS, hardcoded secrets, and more.
content: The /v1/security endpoint scans your code for vulnerabilities for just 3¢. SQL injection, XSS, hardcoded secrets, command injection, path traversal, and more.
